groupings.title: Brand Narrative · TALE (16) — trace → architect → land → evaluate
groupings.description: L1 strategy: trace positioning truth, architect the message/voice/story canon, land it across surfaces, then evaluate separate truth, system, and effectiveness profiles. narrative-quality-auditor never averages those unlike constructs.

groupings.title: SEO/GEO (16) — research → build → optimize → monitor
groupings.description: Search and generative-engine optimization: keyword/SERP/gap research, content and citation readiness, markup/page plays, CORE-EEAT and CITE auditor gates, then rank, performance, and off-site monitoring.

groupings.title: Social · ECHO (16) — explore → craft → host → observe
groupings.description: Organic social: channel/voice discovery, platform-native planning and creative, inbox/crisis operations, then listening and measurement. social-quality-auditor runs one asset-gate or program-maturity profile per unit, never a mixed composite.

groupings.title: Email · SEND (16) — setup → engage → nurture → deliver
groupings.description: Email across promotional, retention, cold-outbound, and newsletter profiles: sender/list setup, creative/rendering, lifecycle journeys, the email-quality-auditor gate, experiments, and provider-level placement monitoring.

groupings.title: Paid ads · ROAS (16) — research → orchestrate → activate → scale
groupings.description: Paid media across direct-response, prospecting, and incremental-profit profiles: structure/audiences/queries/feed, creative/tests/bids/landing, the ad-account-auditor gate, then attribution, pacing, fatigue, and causal readback.

groupings.title: Influencer marketing (16) — discover → plan → activate → measure
groupings.description: Creator campaigns end to end: audience and creator discovery, planning/briefs/budgets, outreach and the C3 ART content gate, contracts/amplification, then post-click, ROI, and reporting evidence.

groupings.title: Launch · RAMP (16) — research → assemble → mobilize → prove
groupings.description: Product launch orchestration: positioning/tier/window/access, assets/pricing/enablement, then separate preflight, execution, and outcome profiles around launch operations, monitoring, feedback, retro, and momentum.

groupings.title: Protocol layer (8) — shared truth registries & memory
groupings.description: Seven sole-writer registries backed by append-only event streams and rebuildable projections, plus non-canonical HOT/WARM/COLD working memory. Other skills propose; registry owners authorize canonical mutations.
